tiebreaker: Most Viziers + Elders combined, then most goods cards

categories.label: Vizier VP
categories.description: 10 VP per Vizier owned plus 10 VP per opponent with fewer Viziers

categories.label: Claimed Tile VP
categories.description: VP printed on each tile you claimed with a camel

categories.label: Palm Trees
categories.description: 3 VP per palm tree on your claimed tiles

categories.label: Palaces
categories.description: 5 VP per palace on your claimed tiles

categories.label: Djinn VP
categories.description: VP as printed on each Djinn card collected

categories.label: Unsold Merchandise VP
categories.description: Sell remaining resource cards at set values (converted to coins/VP)
